data.title: U.S. Trade Negotiations Unaffected by Tariff Litigation, Says Official
data.description: According to Odaily, U.S. Trade Representative Greer stated that ongoing tariff litigation has not impacted trade negotiations. Greer emphasized that if the tariff rulings take an unfavorable turn, there are alternative measures available to expand the scope of Section 301 tariffs as necessary.

data.title: U.S. Treasury Yields Rise as Market Reacts
data.description: According to BlockBeats, U.S. Treasury yields have increased, with the 2-year yield reaching 3.924% and the 10-year yield at 4.409%. This development reflects market reactions to current economic conditions.

data.title: BlackRock IBIT put premium exceeds call premium, market sentiment turns defensive
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The options market for BlackRock's spot Bitcoin exchange-traded fund iShares Bitcoin Trust (IBIT) shows investors' concerns about downside risks. As of Thursday's close, IBIT's one-year put-call skew turned positive, reaching 0.2%, indicating that the premium for put options is slightly higher than that for call options, reflecting a shift in market sentiment from the previous neutral to slightly bearish. On the same day, IBIT's stock price fell 1.32% to close at $59.99, but still recorded a net inflow of $125 million, the lowest single-day inflow since May 13. (CoinDesk)

data.title: Traders still betting the Fed will cut rates in September
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Traders are still betting that the Federal Reserve will cut interest rates in September. (Jinshi)

data.title: U.S. Trade Representative Greer: Tariff litigation has not affected trade negotiations
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: U.S. Trade Representative Greer said that the tariff lawsuit did not affect the trade negotiations, and if the tariff ruling "goes in the opposite direction", we have other tools. (Jinshi)

data.title: BitMart launches Assisterr AI (ASRR)
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, BitMart will launch Assisterr AI (ASRR) at 22:00 (Eastern Time) on May 30, and the ASRR/USDT trading pair will be opened.
Assisterr combines tokenized professional language models (AI agents), real-time monetization, decentralized ownership, and agent-to-agent interoperability into a code-free, scalable platform.

data.title: U.S. Stock Futures and Ethereum Experience Decline Amid Trade Remarks
data.description: According to BlockBeats, U.S. President Donald Trump recently made volatile trade-related comments on social media, leading to a further decline in major U.S. stock index futures. The Dow Jones futures fell by 0.5%, while the S&P 500 and Nasdaq 100 futures both dropped approximately 0.7%. Additionally, Ethereum's price fell below $2,600 during the day, currently quoted at $2,590.

data.title: U.S. Trade Representative: The scope of Section 301 can be expanded as needed
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: U.S. Trade Representative Greer said that the scope of Section 301 tariff measures can be expanded as needed. Section 301 refers to the entire content of Sections 1301-1310 of the Comprehensive Trade and Competitiveness Act of 1988. Its main meaning is to protect the rights of the United States in international trade and retaliate against other countries whose trade practices are considered "unreasonable" and "unfair". According to this provision, the United States can investigate the trade practices of other countries that it considers to be "unfair", and can consult with the governments of the relevant countries. Finally, the president decides to take retaliatory measures such as raising tariffs, restricting imports, and stopping relevant agreements. (Jin Shi)

data.title: Revolut Plans to Relaunch Cryptocurrency Services in the U.S.
data.description: According to Odaily, market sources indicate that the crypto-friendly digital bank Revolut is planning to reintroduce its cryptocurrency services in the United States.

data.title: SharpLink Gaming's Stock Rises Amid Ethereum Reserve Strategy Announcement
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, SharpLink Gaming, a U.S. publicly traded company, saw its stock rise by 18.66% in pre-market trading, with the current price at $94.02. This surge follows the company's announcement of a strategic plan to bolster its Ethereum reserves.

SharpLink Gaming has revealed its intention to raise $425 million to increase its holdings in Ethereum. The fundraising effort is led by Consensys Software Inc., with participation from notable crypto venture capital firms such as ParaFi Capital, Electric Capital, Pantera Capital, and Galaxy Digital. The transaction was expected to be completed by May 29.

The company plans to use the raised funds to purchase Ethereum, establishing it as the primary asset in its treasury reserves.

data.title: Crypto Investor James Wynn Reflects on High-Stakes Trading
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, prominent cryptocurrency investor James Wynn shared his thoughts on social media about his recent trading experiences. Wynn described the thrill of turning $4 million into $100 million, only to see it drop back to $13 million. He expressed no regrets about his high-risk trading approach, acknowledging that most people lack the resources or courage to engage in such transactions. Wynn hinted at future ambitions, stating he might aim for a billion-dollar profit next time and plans to return to the market. Meanwhile, he intends to focus on building a community around the $moonpig token.

Previously, BlockBeats reported that Wynn experienced significant financial losses, with over $96 million lost in the past week and $11.59 million in the last 24 hours, resulting in a total account loss of $14.03 million.

data.title: Hong Kong's Stablecoin Ordinance officially became law today, and the HKMA reminded that no license has been issued yet
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News The Hong Kong Special Administrative Region Government published the Stablecoin Ordinance in the Gazette today (May 30), which means that the Stablecoin Ordinance has officially become a law, further improving Hong Kong's regulatory framework for digital asset activities. The Hong Kong Legislative Council formally passed the draft bill on May 21 to establish a licensing system for issuers of fiat stablecoins (stablecoins pegged to legal tender) in Hong Kong. According to the ordinance, in order to strengthen public protection, only designated licensed institutions can sell fiat stablecoins in Hong Kong; only fiat stablecoins issued by licensed issuers can be sold to retail investors.
The Hong Kong Monetary Authority reminds that the Stablecoin Ordinance will officially take effect later this year. No license has been issued to any stablecoin issuer. Citizens should carefully identify information related to fiat stablecoins and beware of criminals using false advertisements to commit fraud.

data.title: Staking Just Got Safer: SEC Confirms It’s Not a Securities Offering
data.description:
TL;DR The U. S. SEC has clarified that participating in staking activities on Proof-of-Stake (PoS) networks does not constitute a securities offering. This decision benefits platforms like Ethereum and Solana and could allow future crypto ETFs to include staking rewards. Major asset managers such as BlackRock and Fidelity are already in talks to move in that. . . 
source: https://crypto-economy.com/staking-just-got-safer-sec-confirms-its-not-a-securities-offering/

data.title: Jupiter and Kazakhstan Stock Exchange AIX Partner to Explore Dual Listing Mechanism
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Jupiter announced that it has signed a memorandum of cooperation with the Kazakhstan Stock Exchange AIX and Solana Foundation to jointly explore a dual listing mechanism that supports companies to conduct traditional IPOs on AIX and tokenized listings on Intebix at the same time. All parties will evaluate the feasibility of this model in terms of supervision, technology and business, and promote the integrated development of traditional capital markets and blockchain ecology.
